name: multiEchelonOptimize
invariants: output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.echelons.every(function(e){ return Number.isFinite(e.safetyStock) && Number.isFinite(e.reorderPoint) && Number.isFinite(e.cycleStock) && Number.isFinite(e.targetStock) && Number.isFinite(e.daysOfStock) && Number.isFinite(e.imbalance); })
output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.rebalanceTransfers.every(function(t){ return typeof t.from === 'string' && typeof t.to === 'string' && Number.isFinite(t.units); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler; reads flat params (SupplyChainPlanner.EchelonPanel sends flat). Echelon safety stock = ceil(Z * sigma * sqrt(leadTime)); reorderPoint = ceil(demand*leadTime + safetyStock); targetStock = cycleStock + safetyStock; imbalance = current - targetStock; greedy surplus→deficit rebalance transfers. POISON: scNum + Math.max clamps collapse garbage to safe defaults (demand>=0, leadTime>=1) so every numeric stays FINITE. Component renders echelons[].location/tier/currentStock/reorderPoint/safetyStock/targetStock/daysOfStock/imbalance + totals + rebalanceTransfers. Not assassin-driven; pinned by server/tests/supplychain-lens-macros.test.js.
